title: Customer Service Chatbot Response
scenario: Generate a customer service chatbot response for a user who is asking about the status of their order. The response should be in plain text format and must include at least 3 pieces of information: order status, estimated delivery time, and any relevant links to access their order history.
constraints: Must include links to access order history

evaluationCriteria.description: The response must include the order status
The response must estimate the delivery time
The response must include links to access order history
The LLM output must be at most 150 words
